name: onrbat-rdv
description: Application de gestion de rendez-vous commerciaux ONRBAT

scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "cyan,magenta" "node backend/server.js" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
